## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally
- [ ] Coverage meets thresholds (see CLAUDE.md)
- [ ] Self-audited: reviewed own code for logic errors, race conditions, missing error handling
- [ ] Hash chain integrity maintained
- [ ] All events have causal links
- [ ] Docs updated (if interfaces changed)
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] Commit messages follow conventional format
- [ ] No breaking interface changes (or RFC approved)
- [ ] No new dependencies (or justified in PR description)
